channel.title: Frontline on environment and nature | Frontline
channel.description: News on environmental and ecological issues from India and around the world. Frontline reports on climate change, deforestation, water crisis, waste management, air and water pollution, forest rights, tribal issues, land rights, global warming, heat waves, and more.

image.title: Frontline on environment and nature | Frontline

item.title: Trash capitalism
item.description: Alexander Clapp’s Waste Wars shows the global trade in garbage is a dirty business—and it’s the world’s poorest paying the price.

item.title: Failed by the judiciary
item.description: Tamil Nadu’s courts keep issuing orders against illegal mining. The quarries stay open. The activists get killed. And justice? Mostly adjourned.

item.title: Mines that rule: How Tamil Nadu’s quarries dug themselves above the law
item.description: An undisclosed Tamil Nadu government report on illegal quarries in just one block of one district reveals the scale—and the scare—of the trade.

channel.item: What lies beneath: The real cost of Tamil Nadu’s illegal quarriesThey poison wells, ruin farms, and drive out wildlife—but illegal quarries still thrive, chipping away at law, land, and livelihood.https://frontline.thehindu.com/environment/tamil-nadu-illegal-stone-quarries-environmental-impact-health-damage/article69463878.ecearticle-69463878EnvironmentWed, 23 Apr 2025 09:36:00 +0530<media:content height="675" medium="image" url=
